uses: Callista pumila is a species of plant that has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been shown to exhibit potential antioxidant and anticancer activities. Traditional healers in South Africa use the plant to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
